title: Thai Tagine Tofu
description: A fusion of Thai flavors with a Moroccan tagine, served with a creamy sauce.
instructions: 1. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in the bottom of a large clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
4. Add the bell pepper and cook for 5 minutes.
5. Add the tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add the tofu and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
7. Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
8. Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 10-15 minutes.
9. Stir in the fish sauce and soy sauce.
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
11. Garnish with Thai basil and serve over rice.
